data.title: Delete legacy IssueMerger, Models.Legacy, and MergeCommand after event-sourced rollout
data.description: Once event-sourced-issues PRs (1-4) have rolled out across all consumers (Homespun, etc.) and `fleece migrate-events` has been run on every fleece-using repo, delete: (1) src/Fleece.Core/Models/Legacy/, (2) src/Fleece.Core/Services/Legacy/LegacyIssueMerger.cs, (3) src/Fleece.Core/FunctionalCore/Legacy/, (4) src/Fleece.Core/Serialization/Legacy/, (5) src/Fleece.Cli/Commands/MergeCommand.cs and MergeSettings, (6) FleeceSettings.AutoMerge and the AutoMergeInterceptor.\n\nAlso: validate the daily GitHub Action template (`fleece-project.yml`) by running it on a test fork end-to-end. Captured from event-sourced-issues task 14.5 + 15.5.
